title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers, exposing the same endpoints as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that adds Ollama models as LLM and Chat components for chains, agents and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting, managing models and multi-user workspaces, packaged as a Docker image.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder APIs, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for generating and chatting with Ollama models in Rails or plain Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick prompts and model management from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as inline Copilot-style suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai for using Ollama models in retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library providing strongly-typed wrappers for chat, generate and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image with CUDA and ROCm variants for running Ollama server containerised on GPU hosts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models without browser overhead.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models and slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that integrates Ollama LLMs into channels via mentions or slash commands.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package for JavaScript/TypeScript developers to interact with a local Ollama server.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package providing Python bindings for the Ollama REST API, maintained by the Ollama team.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit app demonstrating RAG by combining Ollama LLMs, HuggingFace embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-model-librarian
summary: Utility to batch download, tag and organise Ollama models across multiple registries and architectures.
